title: 4.0 COM Tx from VIP using SUM_SSC

content.text: This page explains the message tx from SoC to Vip and then to Com
In Short terms for each signal group

items: SoC will send signal via INC
INC router in VIP receives the message and send to VData_handler
VData handler receives the signal message and writes to Rte and set an event
OS will call respective runnable for an Signal group in SSC adaptor module
SSC adaptor value compare the received value with old value, if it is new value → It will call corresponding API for the Signal group in SUM_SCC
SUM_SSC will receive the value and add it to Tx Queue
Cyclic runnable of SUM_SSC will process the Tx queue
Will calculate MAC and counter and add it to Queue
finally calls Com_SendSignal with Counter, MAC and data signal
